column1: Private Equity Annual Program Review as of December 31, 2024

column2: CalPERS PE has been cash flow negative as it scales to meet higher asset allocation targets and executes the current PE strategy

•
In 2021, CalPERS approved increasing the PE target from 8% to 13%

•
In 2024, CalPERS approved an increase from 13% to 17%, avoiding repeating its past mistakes of procyclicality

•
Emphasis on secondaries and co-invest has accelerated (1) NAV scaling and (2) the impact of decisions by CalPERS PE on returns
